# Roster - home

The agents currently deployed in this world. Regenerated by spwn whenever the roster changes.

## Members
- **neo** (worker)

## Where to find each member
- Identity: `/agents/<name>/identity/`
- Skills: `/agents/<name>/skills/`
- Memory (knowledge, playbooks, journal): `/agents/<name>/memory/`
- Their inbox in **this** world: `/agents/<name>/worlds/home/inbox/`

## Sending a message
To deliver a message to an agent in this world, write a markdown file into their per-world inbox:

```
/agents/<recipient>/worlds/home/inbox/<timestamp>-from-<sender>.md
```

The recipient will see the file the next time they read their inbox. Inbox messages survive container restarts because they live in each agent's persistent home, not in the world container.
